ast.source: If true (default), nested subsections are included until a sibling or shallower heading. If false, the section ends at the next heading of any level.
ast.target: 如果为 true（默认），则包含嵌套子节，直到遇到同级或更浅的标题。如果为 false，则节在下一个任何级别的标题处结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, also return the text content of the file (or preview-only for large files). Defaults to false.
ast.target: 如果为 true，同时返回文件的文本内容（或大文件仅预览）。默认为 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: JSON array of vault-relative file paths (1–200). Single file: ['Notes/A.md']. Multiple: ['Notes/A.md', 'Notes/B.md']. Never a bare string.
ast.target: 相对于保险库的文件路径的 JSON 数组（1–200）。单个文件：['Notes/A.md']。多个文件：['Notes/A.md', 'Notes/B.md']。绝不能是裸字符串。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 相对于保险库的文件路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check if a given path in the vault is a folder or a file. Use this when the user wants to verify if a path is a folder or check path type.
ast.target: 检查保险库中的给定路径是文件夹还是文件。当用户想要验证路径是否为文件夹或检查路径类型时使用此功能。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 要检查的相对于保险库的路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Resolve a wikilink reference (filename-only) to its full vault path. ONLY use when the reference has no `/` — for paths like `Notes/MyNote.md` resolve directly. Searches the whole vault for a unique match; if a file and folder share the name, the file wins.
ast.target: 将 wikilink 引用（仅文件名）解析为其完整的保险库路径。仅当引用中没有 `/` 时使用 — 对于像 `Notes/MyNote.md` 这样的路径，请直接解析。在整个保险库中搜索唯一匹配项；如果文件和文件夹同名，则文件优先。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The file/folder reference to resolve, e.g. 'MyNote' or 'Notes/MyNote.md'. Can be a wikilink inner text without the [[]] brackets.
ast.target: 要解析的文件/文件夹引用，例如 'MyNote' 或 'Notes/MyNote.md'。可以是不带 [[]] 括号的 wikilink 内部文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path to the file to search inside, e.g. 'Notes/MyNote.md'. Must be a text file (markdown or plain text). Binary and media files are rejected.
ast.target: 要在其中搜索的文件的相对于保险库的路径，例如 'Notes/MyNote.md'。必须是文本文件（Markdown 或纯文本）。二进制和媒体文件会被拒绝。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, treat every entry in `queries` as a JavaScript regular expression pattern. Defaults to false (plain substring match).
ast.target: 如果为 true，则将 `queries` 中的每个条目视为 JavaScript 正则表达式模式。默认为 false（纯子字符串匹配）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether matching is case-sensitive. Defaults to false.
ast.target: 匹配是否区分大小写。默认为 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of context lines to include before and after each match. Defaults to 0 — line numbers alone are usually enough to plan the next call. Set to 1 or 2 only when you genuinely need to disambiguate similar lines.
ast.target: 在每个匹配项前后包含的上下文行数。默认为 0 — 通常仅行号就足以规划下一次调用。仅在确实需要消歧义相似行时才设置为 1 或 2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find files in the vault by path / filename keyword (case-insensitive substring). Use for 'find file X', 'locate notes named …', etc. Paginated: when `has_more` is true, increase `skip` by the previous `count` for the next page.
ast.target: 通过路径/文件名关键字（不区分大小写的子字符串）在保险库中查找文件。用于 '查找文件 X'、'定位名为…的笔记' 等。分页：当 `has_more` 为 true 时，将 `skip` 增加上一个 `count` 以获取下一页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keyword to match against file paths.
ast.target: 要与文件路径匹配的关键字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional file extension filter, e.g. 'md', 'pdf'. Omit to match all extensions.
ast.target: 可选的文件扩展名过滤器，例如 'md'、'pdf'。省略则匹配所有扩展名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of matching files to skip before collecting results. Defaults to 0. Use together with `limit` for pagination.
ast.target: 在收集结果前要跳过的匹配文件数量。默认为 0。与 `limit` 一起使用以进行分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 20.
ast.target: 要返回的最大结果数。默认为 20。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text or regular expression pattern to search for inside file contents. When use_regex is true, this is treated as a JavaScript regular expression pattern.
ast.target: 要在文件内容中搜索的文本或正则表达式模式。当 use_regex 为 true 时，此字段将被视为 JavaScript 正则表达式模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, treat query as a JavaScript regular expression pattern. Defaults to false (plain text search).
ast.target: 如果为 true，则将查询视为 JavaScript 正则表达式模式。默认为 false（纯文本搜索）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether the search is case-sensitive. Defaults to false.
ast.target: 搜索是否区分大小写。默认为 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of matching files to return per page. Defaults to 10.
ast.target: 每页返回的最大匹配文件数。默认为 10。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of lines of context to include around each match. Defaults to 2.
ast.target: 在每个匹配项周围包含的上下文行数。默认为 2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path for the new file, e.g. 'Notes/NewNote.md'. The file extension is required and will not be inferred — use '.md' for markdown notes. Must NOT already exist; the call fails otherwise.
ast.target: 新文件的相对于保险库的路径，例如 'Notes/NewNote.md'。文件扩展名是必需的，且不会被推断——请使用 '.md' 作为 Markdown 笔记。文件必须不存在；否则调用将失败。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text content to write into the file.
ast.target: 要写入文件的文本内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path to the file, e.g. 'Notes/MyNote.md'. When the file does not yet exist, the extension is required and will not be inferred — use '.md' for markdown notes.
ast.target: 文件的相对于保险库的路径，例如 'Notes/MyNote.md'。当文件尚不存在时，扩展名是必需的，且不会被推断——请使用 '.md' 作为 Markdown 笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text to append to the file.
ast.target: 要追加到文件的文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Prepend text to the beginning of an existing file. If the file has YAML frontmatter (delimited by `---`), the content is inserted immediately AFTER the closing `---`; otherwise at the very start. Creates the file if missing.
ast.target: 将文本添加到现有文件的开头。如果文件具有 YAML 前置内容（由 `---` 分隔），则内容将插入在结束的 `---` 之后；否则插入在最开头。如果文件缺失则创建。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text to prepend to the file.
ast.target: 要添加到文件开头的文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Current vault-relative path of the file or folder, e.g. 'Notes/OldName.md'.
ast.target: 文件或文件夹的当前相对于保险库的路径，例如 'Notes/OldName.md'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: New vault-relative path for the file or folder. For files: include the full path with filename and extension, e.g. 'Archive/NewName.md'. Use a different folder prefix to move (e.g. 'Inbox/A.md' → 'Projects/A.md'), a different filename to rename, or change both at once.
ast.target: 文件或文件夹的新相对于保险库的路径。对于文件：请包含完整路径（含文件名和扩展名），例如 'Archive/NewName.md'。使用不同的文件夹前缀可移动文件（例如 'Inbox/A.md' → 'Projects/A.md'），使用不同的文件名可重命名，或同时更改两者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path to the file, e.g. 'Notes/MyNote.md'.
ast.target: 文件的相对于保险库的路径，例如 'Notes/MyNote.md'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List of edits to apply atomically. Each entry must provide exactly one of `pattern` (literal text mode) or `anchor` (heading-path mode). All entries match the file's pre-edit content; matched ranges across entries must be disjoint.
ast.target: 要原子性应用的编辑列表。每个条目必须提供 `pattern`（字面文本模式）或 `anchor`（标题路径模式）中的一个。所有条目都匹配文件编辑前的内容；各条目匹配的范围必须互不重叠。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [anchor mode] Position the edit by heading path. Mutually exclusive with `pattern`. The heading path resolves uniquely against the file's outline; ambiguous or missing paths cause the whole call to fail with a diagnostic listing the available paths.
ast.target: [锚点模式] 通过标题路径定位编辑位置。与 `pattern` 互斥。标题路径根据文件大纲唯一解析；路径不明确或缺失将导致整个调用失败，并列出可用路径作为诊断信息。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Heading titles, outermost → innermost, that the target heading's ancestor chain must END WITH. A short tail (even a single leaf title) is accepted IF it is unique in the file; otherwise the call fails as ambiguous and you must prepend more ancestors. Intermediate ancestors must NOT be skipped.
ast.target: 标题标题，从最外层到最内层，目标标题的祖先链必须以此结尾。如果短尾（即使是单个叶子标题）在文件中是唯一的，则可以接受；否则调用将因不明确而失败，您必须添加更多祖先。不得跳过中间祖先。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text to substitute in. For pattern mode, '' deletes the match. For anchor mode insert/append/prepend variants, '' is allowed but unusual.
ast.target: 要替换的文本。对于模式模式，'' 表示删除匹配项。对于锚点模式的插入/追加/前置变体，允许使用 ''，但不太常见。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [pattern mode only] If true, replace every occurrence of `pattern`. Defaults to false. Not allowed in anchor mode (an anchor resolves to a unique location).
ast.target: [仅模式模式] 如果为 true，则替换 `pattern` 的每个出现。默认为 false。在锚点模式中不允许使用（锚点解析到唯一位置）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [pattern mode only] Optional assertion: number of occurrences of `pattern` you expect in the pre-edit file. If actual count differs, the whole call fails before any write. Not allowed in anchor mode.
ast.target: [仅模式模式] 可选断言：您期望在编辑前文件中 `pattern` 出现的次数。如果实际计数不同，整个调用将在任何写入操作前失败。在锚点模式中不允许使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, bypass the tag-shape safety guard for this entry only (pattern mode). Defaults to false. In anchor mode the guard does not apply; force is accepted for symmetry but has no effect.
ast.target: 如果为 true，则仅为此条目绕过标签形状安全防护（模式模式）。默认为 false。在锚点模式中，防护不适用；为保持对称性接受 force 参数，但无实际效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, validate and preview the result without modifying the file. Defaults to false.
ast.target: 如果为 true，则验证并预览结果而不修改文件。默认为 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional Unix ms; the file's expected current `mtime`. If actual on-disk `mtime` differs, the call fails (concurrent-edit guard). Chain from a prior read tool's `mtime` or another write tool's `new_mtime`.
ast.target: 可选的 Unix 毫秒时间戳；文件的预期当前 `mtime`。如果实际磁盘上的 `mtime` 不同，调用将失败（并发编辑防护）。从先前读取工具的 `mtime` 或另一个写入工具的 `new_mtime` 链接。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List of edits to apply atomically. Each edit's line numbers refer to the file BEFORE any edit is applied. Ranged edits (replace/delete) must not overlap. Insert edits (op: insert_before) are zero-width and never conflict.
ast.target: 要原子性应用的编辑列表。每个编辑的行号指的是应用任何编辑之前的文件。范围编辑（替换/删除）不得重叠。插入编辑（操作：insert_before）是零宽度的，永远不会冲突。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1-based INCLUSIVE physical end of the range. Required for replace/delete, UNUSED for insert_before. The range is [start_line, end_line] — both bounds inclusive. Must be >= start_line (for replace/delete). Field name is `end_line` (with underscore). LLM aliases `end` also accepted.
ast.target: 基于 1 的包含性物理范围结束行。对于替换/删除是必需的，对于 insert_before 未使用。范围是 [start_line, end_line]——两个边界都包含。必须 >= start_line（对于替换/删除）。字段名为 `end_line`（带下划线）。LLM 别名 `end` 也可接受。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative paths of the markdown files to edit (1 or more). All paths must point to existing markdown files.
ast.target: 要编辑的 Markdown 文件的相对于保险库的路径（1 个或多个）。所有路径必须指向现有的 Markdown 文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, return the per-file impact report without modifying any files. Defaults to false.
ast.target: 如果为 true，则返回每个文件的影响报告而不修改任何文件。默认为 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The FULL new content of the file. This replaces the existing content verbatim (no implicit newline added / stripped).
ast.target: 文件的完整新内容。这将逐字替换现有内容（不会隐式添加/删除换行符）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, validate and return the size / excerpt envelope WITHOUT modifying the file. Does NOT return the full new content — the caller already has it.
ast.target: 如果为 true，则验证并返回大小/摘要信封而不修改文件。不返回完整新内容——调用者已拥有它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path for the output file, e.g. 'Journal/2025-05-25.md'. Must NOT already exist. File extension is required and will not be inferred — use '.md' for markdown notes.
ast.target: 输出文件的相对于保险库的路径，例如 'Journal/2025-05-25.md'。必须不存在。文件扩展名是必需的，且不会被推断——请使用 '.md' 作为 Markdown 笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional ISO-8601 date string (YYYY-MM-DD) used as the reference date for {{date}}, {{yesterday}}, {{tomorrow}}, and date-formatted variables. Defaults to today's date. Use this to create a note for a specific date, e.g. "2025-05-25".
ast.target: 可选的 ISO-8601 日期字符串（YYYY-MM-DD），用作 {{date}}、{{yesterday}}、{{tomorrow}} 和日期格式变量的参考日期。默认为今天的日期。使用此选项可为特定日期创建笔记，例如 \"2025-05-25\"。

ast.name: description
ast.source: How many top file extensions to list by count in the response. Defaults to 10.
ast.target: 在响应中按计数列出的顶级文件扩展名数量。默认为 10。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List files sorted by `mtime` (default; most recent first), `ctime`, or `size`. Optionally filter by minimum mtime, file extension, or folder prefix. Use for 'what did I edit recently?', 'what are my largest notes?', 'what are the oldest notes?' and similar recency / size queries.
ast.target: 按 `mtime`（默认；最近优先）、`ctime` 或 `size` 排序的文件列表。可选择按最小 mtime、文件扩展名或文件夹前缀过滤。用于“我最近编辑了什么？”、“我最大的笔记是什么？”、“最旧的笔记是什么？”以及类似的近期/大小查询。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of files to return. Defaults to 20.
ast.target: 要返回的最大文件数。默认为 20。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Field to sort by. 'mtime' = modification time (default), 'ctime' = creation time, 'size' = file size in bytes.
ast.target: 排序字段。'mtime' = 修改时间（默认），'ctime' = 创建时间，'size' = 文件大小（字节）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sort direction. 'desc' = descending (default, e.g. newest/largest first), 'asc' = ascending (e.g. oldest/smallest first).
ast.target: 排序方向。'desc' = 降序（默认，例如最新/最大优先），'asc' = 升序（例如最旧/最小优先）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unix timestamp in milliseconds; only return files modified at or after this time. Omit to include all files.
ast.target: Unix 毫秒时间戳；仅返回在此时间或之后修改的文件。省略则包含所有文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional file extension filter (e.g. 'md', 'pdf'). Omit to include every extension.
ast.target: 可选的文件扩展名过滤器（例如 'md'、'pdf'）。省略则包含所有扩展名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional vault-relative folder prefix filter (e.g. 'Projects/'). Only files whose path starts with this prefix are returned. Omit to search the entire vault.
ast.target: 可选的相对于保险库的文件夹前缀过滤器（例如 'Projects/'）。仅返回路径以此前缀开头的文件。省略则搜索整个保险库。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path to the folder to list. Use '' or '/' for the vault root.
ast.target: 要列出的文件夹的相对于保险库的路径。使用 '' 或 '/' 表示保险库根目录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: How many levels of descendants to include. 0 (default) = only direct children of `path`. 1 = direct children and their children. -1 = fully recursive, no depth limit. Use 2 as a good default when exploring an unfamiliar vault.
ast.target: 要包含的后代层级数。0（默认）= 仅 `path` 的直接子项。1 = 直接子项及其子项。-1 = 完全递归，无深度限制。在探索不熟悉的保险库时，使用 2 是一个不错的默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter entries by type. "all" (default) returns both files and folders. "folder" returns only folder entries. "file" returns only file entries.
ast.target: 按类型过滤条目。\"all\"（默认）返回文件和文件夹。\"folder\" 仅返回文件夹条目。\"file\" 仅返回文件条目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of matching entries to skip before starting to collect results. Use together with `limit` for paginated browsing. Defaults to 0. When `has_more` is true, increase `skip` by the previous `count` to fetch the next page.
ast.target: 在开始收集结果前要跳过的匹配条目数量。与 `limit` 一起使用以进行分页浏览。默认为 0。当 `has_more` 为 true 时，将 `skip` 增加前一个 `count` 以获取下一页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of entries to return. Defaults to 1000. If there are more entries beyond `skip + limit`, the response will include `has_more: true`. Use `skip` to paginate through large folders.
ast.target: 要返回的最大条目数。默认为 1000。如果在 `skip + limit` 之后还有更多条目，响应将包含 `has_more: true`。使用 `skip` 来浏览大型文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path of the target file whose backlinks should be returned.
ast.target: 应返回其反向链接的目标文件的相对于保险库的路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of backlink source files to return. Defaults to 50.
ast.target: 要返回的最大反向链接源文件数。默认为 50。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Which kind of files to scan. 'all' (default) scans every file. 'note' scans only markdown/canvas notes (.md, .canvas). 'attachment' scans only non-note files (images, PDFs, audio, etc.).
ast.target: 要扫描的文件类型。'all'（默认）扫描所有文件。'note' 仅扫描 Markdown/画布笔记（.md、.canvas）。'attachment' 仅扫描非笔记文件（图像、PDF、音频等）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional vault-relative folder prefix filter (e.g. 'Attachments/'). Only files whose path starts with this prefix are considered. Omit to scan the entire vault.
ast.target: 可选的、相对于保险库的文件夹前缀过滤器（例如 'Attachments/'）。仅考虑路径以此前缀开头的文件。省略则扫描整个保险库。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional exact extension filter (e.g. 'png', 'pdf'). Leading dot is tolerated. Omit to include every extension.
ast.target: 可选的精确扩展名过滤器（例如 'png', 'pdf'）。允许包含前导点。省略则包含所有扩展名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sort key for the result page. 'path' (default) gives stable, pageable ordering. 'size' and 'mtime' are useful when the user wants to prioritise large or stale files.
ast.target: 结果页的排序键。'path'（默认）提供稳定、可分页的排序。'size' 和 'mtime' 在用户希望优先处理大文件或陈旧文件时很有用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sort direction. Defaults to 'asc' for 'path', 'desc' for 'size' and 'mtime' when omitted.
ast.target: 排序方向。省略时，'path' 默认为 'asc'，'size' 和 'mtime' 默认为 'desc'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of matching orphan files to skip before starting to collect results. Use together with `limit` for paginated browsing. Defaults to 0. When `has_more` is true, increase `skip` by the previous `count` to fetch the next page.
ast.target: 在开始收集结果前要跳过的匹配孤立文件数量。与 `limit` 配合使用以实现分页浏览。默认为 0。当 `has_more` 为 true 时，将 `skip` 增加上一个 `count` 的值以获取下一页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of orphan files to return in this page. Defaults to 100. Hard maximum 500.
ast.target: 此页面中要返回的最大孤立文件数量。默认为 100。硬性上限为 500。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path of the source file whose outgoing links should be returned.
ast.target: 源文件的、相对于保险库的路径，该文件的出站链接应被返回。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, also include unresolved (broken) wikilinks under `unresolved`. Defaults to false.
ast.target: 如果为 true，也会在 `unresolved` 下包含未解析（断裂）的维基链接。默认为 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: View shape. 'source' = one entry per source file with its broken links underneath. 'link' = one entry per missing target with the sources pointing at it underneath. Defaults to 'source'.
ast.target: 视图形状。'source' = 每个源文件一个条目，其断裂链接列在下方。'link' = 每个缺失目标一个条目，指向它的源文件列在下方。默认为 'source'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional vault-relative folder prefix filter on the SOURCE file path (e.g. 'Projects/'). Only broken links from files under this prefix are returned. Omit to scan the entire vault.
ast.target: 可选的、针对 SOURCE 文件路径的、相对于保险库的文件夹前缀过滤器（例如 'Projects/'）。仅返回此前缀下文件的断裂链接。省略则扫描整个保险库。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional case-insensitive substring filter on the unresolved link text. Use to narrow to a specific missing target name. Omit to include all.
ast.target: 可选的、不区分大小写的子字符串过滤器，应用于未解析的链接文本。用于缩小到特定的缺失目标名称。省略则包含所有。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of grouped entries to skip before collecting results. Defaults to 0. Use together with `limit` for pagination.
ast.target: 在收集结果前要跳过的分组条目数量。默认为 0。与 `limit` 配合使用以实现分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of ranked notes to skip for pagination. Defaults to 0.
ast.target: 用于分页的、要跳过的已排序笔记数量。默认为 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional vault-relative folder prefix; only source notes under this path are ranked (e.g. 'Daily/').
ast.target: 可选的、相对于保险库的文件夹前缀；仅对此路径下的源笔记进行排名（例如 'Daily/'）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, include `top_attachments` per note (largest contributing targets). Defaults to false.
ast.target: 如果为 true，则包含每个笔记的 `top_attachments`（贡献最大的目标）。默认为 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List all tags in the vault with per-tag note counts. Tags are returned as `#tag`. Optionally filter by a prefix to narrow to a tag namespace (e.g. `project/`). Use to discover tag vocabulary before searching for notes.
ast.target: 列出保险库中的所有标签及每个标签的笔记计数。标签以 `#tag` 形式返回。可选地按前缀过滤以缩小到特定的标签命名空间（例如 `project/`）。用于在搜索笔记前发现标签词汇。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional tag prefix filter. Can be provided with or without the leading '#'. Example: 'project/' returns all sub-tags of #project. Omit to list all tags.
ast.target: 可选的标签前缀过滤器。可以带或不带前导 '#' 提供。示例：'project/' 返回 #project 的所有子标签。省略则列出所有标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of tags to return, sorted by descending note count. Defaults to 100.
ast.target: 要返回的最大标签数量，按笔记计数降序排序。默认为 100。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of tags to skip. Defaults to 0. Set to previous skip + number of returned tags to fetch the next page when has_more is true.
ast.target: 要跳过的标签数量。默认为 0。当 has_more 为 true 时，设置为之前的 skip 加上返回的标签数量以获取下一页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Array of tags to search for (1–10 tags), with or without the leading '#'. Example: ['project', '#review'].
ast.target: 要搜索的标签数组（1-10 个标签），可以带或不带前导 '#'。示例：['project', '#review']。

ast.name: description
ast.source: How to combine the tag list. 'any' (default) = OR — a file matches if it carries ANY one of the tags. 'all' = AND — a file must carry EVERY tag. With a single tag in the list, both modes are equivalent.
ast.target: 如何组合标签列表。'any'（默认）= OR — 如果文件携带列表中的任何一个标签，则匹配。'all' = AND — 文件必须携带列表中的每一个标签。当列表中只有一个标签时，两种模式等效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, also match nested sub-tags (e.g. tag='project' matches #project/alpha). Defaults to false (exact match only).
ast.target: 如果为 true，也匹配嵌套的子标签（例如 tag='project' 匹配 #project/alpha）。默认为 false（仅精确匹配）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of matching files to return. Defaults to 200.
ast.target: 要返回的最大匹配文件数量。默认为 200。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of matching results to skip. Defaults to 0. Set to previous skip + count to fetch the next page when has_more is true.
ast.target: 要跳过的匹配结果数量。默认为 0。当 has_more 为 true 时，设置为之前的 skip 加上 count 以获取下一页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, return the per-file impact report without modifying any files. Defaults to false. Strongly recommended to run once with dry_run=true first.
ast.target: 如果为 true，则返回每个文件的影响报告而不修改任何文件。默认为 false。强烈建议先以 dry_run=true 运行一次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative paths of the markdown files to add tags to (1 or more). All paths must point to existing markdown files.
ast.target: 要添加标签的 Markdown 文件的、相对于保险库的路径（1 个或更多）。所有路径必须指向现有的 Markdown 文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Where to add the tags. `frontmatter` (default) = add to YAML frontmatter tags. `inline` = append `#tag` occurrences on a new line at the end of the file. Defaults to `frontmatter`.
ast.target: 将标签添加到何处。`frontmatter`（默认）= 添加到 YAML 前言标签。`inline` = 在文件末尾的新行追加 `#tag` 出现。默认为 `frontmatter`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative paths of the markdown files to set tags on (1 or more). All paths must point to existing markdown files.
ast.target: 要设置标签的 Markdown 文件的、相对于保险库的路径（1 个或更多）。所有路径必须指向现有的 Markdown 文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path to a .canvas file, e.g. 'Boards/Overview.canvas'.
ast.target: 指向 .canvas 文件的、相对于保险库的路径，例如 'Boards/Overview.canvas'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List all nodes in a `.canvas` file with id, type, and key attributes. Use to discover node ids before calling `update_canvas_nodes`, `delete_canvas_nodes`, `add_canvas_edges`, or `layout_canvas_grid`. Call AFTER `read_canvas` when you need to reference specific nodes.
ast.target: 列出 `.canvas` 文件中的所有节点，包含 id、类型和关键属性。用于在调用 `update_canvas_nodes`、`delete_canvas_nodes`、`add_canvas_edges` 或 `layout_canvas_grid` 前发现节点 id。当需要引用特定节点时，在 `read_canvas` 之后调用。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 指向 .canvas 文件的、相对于保险库的路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The id of the node to read.
ast.target: 要读取的节点的 id。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List all edges in a `.canvas` file with id, fromNode, toNode, and styling fields (label, color, fromSide, toSide, fromEnd, toEnd). Use to discover edge ids before calling `update_canvas_edges` or `delete_canvas_edges`. Call AFTER `read_canvas` when you need to reference specific edges.
ast.target: 列出 `.canvas` 文件中的所有边，包含 id、fromNode、toNode 和样式字段（label、color、fromSide、toSide、fromEnd、toEnd）。用于在调用 `update_canvas_edges` 或 `delete_canvas_edges` 前发现边 id。当需要引用特定边时，在 `read_canvas` 之后调用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path ending in `.canvas`, e.g. 'Boards/Overview.canvas'. Must NOT already exist.
ast.target: 以 `.canvas` 结尾的、相对于保险库的路径，例如 'Boards/Overview.canvas'。必须尚不存在。

ast.name: description
ast.source: JSON Canvas document body (object with `nodes` and/or `edges` arrays). Each node needs id, type, x, y, width, height; file nodes need `file`; link nodes need `url`. Coordinates are written as-is; use `layout_canvas_grid` to reposition afterwards.
ast.target: JSON Canvas 文档正文（包含 `nodes` 和/或 `edges` 数组的对象）。每个节点需要 id、type、x、y、width、height；文件节点需要 `file`；链接节点需要 `url`。坐标按原样写入；之后使用 `layout_canvas_grid` 重新定位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path to an existing .canvas file.
ast.target: 指向现有 .canvas 文件的、相对于保险库的路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional Unix ms; fail if on-disk mtime differs (concurrent-edit guard).
ast.target: 可选的 Unix 毫秒时间戳；如果磁盘上的 mtime 不同则失败（并发编辑保护）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add one or more nodes to an existing `.canvas` file. Missing `id` values are generated; missing `x`/`y`/`width`/`height` get sensible defaults (grid below existing content). The merged document is validated before writing. Use `read_canvas` first to inspect layout.
ast.target: 向现有 `.canvas` 文件添加一个或多个节点。缺失的 `id` 值会自动生成；缺失的 `x`/`y`/`width`/`height` 会获得合理的默认值（位于现有内容下方的网格）。合并后的文档在写入前会进行验证。请先使用 `read_canvas` 检查布局。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Nodes to append. Each needs `type` (text|file|link|group). File nodes need `file`; link nodes need `url`. Optional: id, x, y, width, height, text, label, subpath, color, background, backgroundStyle (group nodes only: cover|ratio|repeat).
ast.target: 要追加的节点。每个节点需要 `type`（text|file|link|group）。文件节点需要 `file`；链接节点需要 `url`。可选：id、x、y、width、height、text、label、subpath、color、background、backgroundStyle（仅限组节点：cover|ratio|repeat）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, validate and preview without writing. Defaults to false.
ast.target: 如果为 true，则验证并预览而不写入。默认为 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional Unix ms; fail if on-disk mtime differs.
ast.target: 可选的 Unix 毫秒时间戳；如果磁盘上的 mtime 不同则失败。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add one or more edges to an existing `.canvas` file. Missing `id` values are generated. `fromNode` and `toNode` must reference existing node ids. Validated before writing.
ast.target: 向现有 `.canvas` 文件添加一条或多条边。缺失的 `id` 值会自动生成。`fromNode` 和 `toNode` 必须引用现有的节点 id。写入前会进行验证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Edges to append. Each needs `fromNode` and `toNode`. Optional: id, fromSide, toSide, fromEnd, toEnd, label, color.
ast.target: 要追加的边。每条边需要 `fromNode` 和 `toNode`。可选：id、fromSide、toSide、fromEnd、toEnd、label、color。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 网格列数。默认为 3。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Pixel gap between grid cells. Defaults to 120.
ast.target: 网格单元格之间的像素间距。默认为 120。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Top-left X origin of the grid. Defaults to 0.
ast.target: 网格左上角的 X 原点。默认为 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Top-left Y origin of the grid. Defaults to 0.
ast.target: 网格左上角的 Y 原点。默认为 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When set, only these node ids are repositioned (mutually exclusive with group_id).
ast.target: 设置后，仅重新定位这些节点 id（与 group_id 互斥）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When set, reposition non-group nodes whose center lies inside this group node (mutually exclusive with node_ids).
ast.target: 设置后，重新定位其中心位于此组节点内的非组节点（与 node_ids 互斥）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When laying out all nodes (no node_ids/group_id), also reposition group-type nodes. Defaults to false.
ast.target: 当布局所有节点（无 node_ids/group_id）时，也重新定位组类型节点。默认为 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, preview layout without writing. Defaults to false.
ast.target: 如果为 true，则预览布局而不写入。默认为 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Update fields of existing nodes in a `.canvas` file by id. Only the provided fields are changed — omitted fields are left alone. Use `list_canvas_nodes` first to discover node ids and current values. Does NOT add or delete nodes.
ast.target: 通过 id 更新 `.canvas` 文件中现有节点的字段。仅更改提供的字段——未提供的字段保持不变。请先使用 `list_canvas_nodes` 来发现节点 id 和当前值。不会添加或删除节点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Patches to apply. Each entry needs `id` and any fields to update: text, file, url, label, color, x, y, width, height, subpath. Omitted fields are left unchanged.
ast.target: 要应用的补丁。每个条目需要 `id` 和任何要更新的字段：text、file、url、label、color、x、y、width、height、subpath。未提供的字段保持不变。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 要更新的节点 id。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 背景图片路径（仅限组节点）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: cover、ratio 或 repeat（组节点）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Delete one or more edges from a `.canvas` file by id. Does NOT affect nodes. Use `list_canvas_edges` to discover edge ids, or `read_file` for full JSON.
ast.target: 通过 id 从 `.canvas` 文件中删除一条或多条边。不影响节点。请使用 `list_canvas_edges` 来发现边 id，或使用 `read_file` 获取完整 JSON。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Update fields of existing edges in a `.canvas` file by id. Only the provided fields are changed — omitted fields are left alone. Use `list_canvas_edges` first to discover edge ids and current values. Does NOT add or delete edges.
ast.target: 通过 id 更新 `.canvas` 文件中现有边的字段。仅更改提供的字段——未提供的字段保持不变。请先使用 `list_canvas_edges` 来发现边 id 和当前值。不会添加或删除边。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Patches to apply. Each entry needs `id` and any fields to update: label, color, fromSide, toSide, fromEnd, toEnd. Omitted fields are left unchanged.
ast.target: 要应用的补丁。每个条目需要 `id` 和任何要更新的字段：label、color、fromSide、toSide、fromEnd、toEnd。未提供的字段保持不变。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 要更新的边 id。

ast.name: description
ast.target: top、right、bottom 或 left。

ast.name: description
ast.target: none 或 arrow。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path to a .base file, e.g. 'Bases/Orphans.base'.
ast.target: 相对于保险库的 .base 文件路径，例如 'Bases/Orphans.base'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a NEW Obsidian Bases file (`.base`, YAML). Content is validated (YAML parse + view structure) before writing. REFUSES if the path already exists. Prefer this over `create_file` for Bases files. Does NOT execute filter expressions — only static validation.
ast.target: 创建一个新的 Obsidian Bases 文件（`.base`，YAML）。写入前会验证内容（YAML 解析 + 视图结构）。如果路径已存在则拒绝。对于 Bases 文件，请优先使用此方法而非 `create_file`。不会执行筛选表达式——仅进行静态验证。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path ending in `.base`, e.g. 'Bases/Orphans.base'. Must NOT already exist.
ast.target: 以 `.base` 结尾的相对于保险库的路径，例如 'Bases/Orphans.base'。该路径必须不存在。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Replace the ENTIRE body of an existing `.base` file with new YAML content. Validated before writing. Does NOT create new files — use `create_base`.
ast.target: 用新的 YAML 内容替换现有 `.base` 文件的整个正文。写入前会进行验证。不会创建新文件——请使用 `create_base`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path to an existing .base file.
ast.target: 指向现有 .base 文件的相对于保险库的路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: View definition. Required: `type`, `name`. Optional: `order` (string[]), `limit` (number), `filters` (object or expression), `groupBy` ({ property, direction? }), `summaries`.
ast.target: 视图定义。必需：`type`、`name`。可选：`order`（字符串数组）、`limit`（数字）、`filters`（对象或表达式）、`groupBy`（{ property, direction? }）、`summaries`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If true, validate without writing. Defaults to false.
ast.target: 如果为 true，则验证而不写入。默认为 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Replace filters on an existing `.base` file — either global (`scope: global`) or on a specific view (`scope: view` + `view_name`). `filters` may be a filter expression string, or an and/or/not object per Bases syntax. Does NOT execute filters; static validation only.
ast.target: 替换现有 `.base` 文件上的筛选器——可以是全局的（`scope: global`）或特定视图上的（`scope: view` + `view_name`）。`filters` 可以是筛选表达式字符串，或符合 Bases 语法的 and/or/not 对象。不会执行筛选器；仅进行静态验证。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 'global' 替换根级别的 `filters`；'view' 替换视图的 `filters`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Required when scope is 'view': the target view's `name`.
ast.target: 当 scope 为 'view' 时必需：目标视图的 `name`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Replace the `order` column list on a named view in an existing `.base` file. Use property names like 'file.name', 'file.mtime', 'note.status', 'formula.my_formula'.
ast.target: 替换现有 `.base` 文件中命名视图的 `order` 列列表。请使用属性名称，如 'file.name'、'file.mtime'、'note.status'、'formula.my_formula'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Name of the view to update (must already exist).
ast.target: 要更新的视图名称（必须已存在）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: New column order as an array of property names.
ast.target: 新的列顺序，作为属性名称数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search the web using DuckDuckGo and return a list of results (title, URL, snippet). Use this when the user asks to search, look up, find information, check, or query something on the internet/web. Call this before using web_fetch_url to get the actual content.
ast.target: 使用 DuckDuckGo 搜索网络并返回结果列表（标题、URL、摘要）。当用户要求搜索、查找、查找信息、检查或查询互联网/网络上的内容时使用此功能。在使用 web_fetch_url 获取实际内容之前，请先调用此功能。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 搜索查询字符串。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of results to return (default 10, max 20).
ast.target: 要返回的最大结果数（默认为 10，最大为 20）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search for images on the web and return a list of image URLs matching the query. Use this when the user wants to find, look for, or search for images/pictures online. Note: Only URLs are returned; use download_image_urls to save images to the vault.
ast.target: 在网络上搜索图像并返回与查询匹配的图像 URL 列表。当用户想要在线查找、寻找或搜索图像/图片时使用此功能。注意：仅返回 URL；请使用 download_image_urls 将图像保存到保险库。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 图像的搜索查询。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An array of image URLs to save.
ast.target: 要保存的图像 URL 数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of images to save. Must not exceed 20.
ast.target: 要保存的图像数量。不得超过 20。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The full URL of the page to fetch.
ast.target: 要获取的页面的完整 URL。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The RSS/Atom feed URL to fetch.
ast.target: 要获取的 RSS/Atom 订阅源 URL。

ast.name: description
ast.source: JavaScript code to execute. Runs as the body of an async function in strict mode with `app`, `console`, and `signal` as parameters. Use `return` to produce output. Avoid infinite loops or long-running operations.
ast.target: 要执行的 JavaScript 代码。作为严格模式下的异步函数主体运行，参数为 `app`、`console` 和 `signal`。使用 `return` 产生输出。避免无限循环或长时间运行的操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The exact skill name as advertised in 'Available Skills'. Matching is case-insensitive.
ast.target: 在“可用技能”中公布的精确技能名称。匹配不区分大小写。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate an image based on a text description using AI. The generated image will be saved to the vault and a markdown image link will be returned. Use this when the user asks to create, draw, generate, design, make, or produce an image, illustration, picture, or artwork.
ast.target: 使用 AI 根据文本描述生成图像。生成的图像将保存到保险库，并将返回一个 Markdown 图像链接。当用户要求创建、绘制、生成、设计、制作或产生图像、插图、图片或艺术作品时使用此功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A detailed text description of the image to generate. Be as specific as possible about the subject, style, composition, colors, and mood.
ast.target: 要生成的图像的详细文本描述。尽可能具体地描述主题、风格、构图、颜色和氛围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The aspect ratio of the generated image. Common: '1:1' (square), '16:9' / '21:9' (landscape), '9:16' (portrait), '4:3' / '3:4', '3:2' / '2:3', '5:4' / '4:5'. Omit to let the model pick a default.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The resolution bucket for the generated image. '1K' (default, ~1024px on the long side), '2K' (~2048px), '4K' (~4096px). Use a larger value only when the user asks for high resolution; larger sizes are slower and more expensive.
ast.target: 生成图像的分辨率桶。'1K'（默认，长边约 1024 像素）、'2K'（约 2048 像素）、'4K'（约 4096 像素）。仅当用户要求高分辨率时才使用较大的值；较大的尺寸更慢且成本更高。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The aspect ratio of the generated image. Common: '1:1' (square), '16:9' / '21:9' (landscape), '9:16' (portrait), '4:3' / '3:4', '3:2' / '2:3'. The actual pixel resolution is chosen automatically based on the configured model. Omit to let the model pick a default.
ast.target: 生成图像的宽高比。常见：'1:1'（正方形）、'16:9' / '21:9'（横向）、'9:16'（纵向）、'4:3' / '3:4'、'3:2' / '2:3'。实际像素分辨率根据配置的模型自动选择。省略则让模型选择默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The quality of the generated image. Supported values: 'standard', 'hd'. Only available for DALL-E 3.
ast.target: 生成图像的质量。支持的值：'standard'、'hd'。仅适用于 DALL-E 3。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The style of the generated image. Supported values: 'vivid' (hyper-real), 'natural' (more natural). Only available for DALL-E 3.
ast.target: 生成图像的风格。支持的值：'vivid'（超现实）、'natural'（更自然）。仅适用于 DALL-E 3。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The aspect ratio of the generated image. Common: '1:1' (square), '16:9' / '21:9' (landscape), '9:16' (portrait), '4:3' / '3:4', '3:2' / '2:3'. The actual pixel resolution is chosen automatically. Omit to let the model pick a default (1024x1024).

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of turns to retrieve. Each turn contains one user message and its corresponding assistant response. Recommended: 1-3 turns. If 0 or negative, defaults to 1 turn.
ast.target: 要检索的轮次数量。每轮包含一条用户消息及其对应的助手响应。建议：1-3 轮。如果为 0 或负数，则默认为 1 轮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used only with action='write'. The full new list. Each entry needs `id` (short stable string you choose), `brief` (one-line user-facing summary, ≤ 80 chars), and `content` (longer machine-facing task spec, ≤ 700 chars). `status` defaults to 'pending' when omitted.
ast.target: 仅与 action='write' 一起使用。完整的新列表。每个条目需要 `id`（您选择的简短稳定字符串）、`brief`（单行面向用户的摘要，≤ 80 个字符）和 `content`（更长的面向机器的任务规范，≤ 700 个字符）。省略时 `status` 默认为 'pending'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Short stable identifier you pick (e.g. "step-1", "refactor"). Must be unique within the list.
ast.target: 您选择的简短稳定标识符（例如 \"step-1\"、\"refactor\"）。在列表中必须唯一。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Short user-facing summary (≤ 80 chars). Rendered verbatim in the TODO panel — keep it to a single line in the user's language. Required.
ast.target: 简短的面向用户的摘要（≤ 80 个字符）。在 TODO 面板中逐字渲染——请用用户的语言保持为单行。必需。

ast.name: description

ast.target: 初始状态。省略时默认为 \"pending\"。
